Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cicero/Milwaukee
ShortDescription: #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Milwaukee, Montrose and Cicero, then into the terminal due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Milwaukee, Montrose and Cicero, then into the terminal.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Cicero/Milwaukee.
